overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through a neon-lit futuristic city. The player moves through covered walkways, crosses streets with futuristic traffic, and walks past towering buildings with holographic advertisements and reflective wet pavement.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway with vehicle crosswalk

events.description: futuristic black sedan with illuminated windows drives past from right to left
begins crossing the yellow striped crosswalk toward the archway exit

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the covered walkway toward the archway exit, observing passing traffic

notable_agents.action: futuristic black sedan with purple tinted windows driving past the crosswalk

entered.detail: large concrete archway forming the exit of the covered walkway with metallic trim
illuminated rectangular sign with 'STORE' text mounted above the archway
purple illuminated corporate signage with 'WNS' text on building facade
tall digital billboard displaying a figure in yellow against dark background
broad pedestrian crossing with alternating yellow and black diagonal stripes

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a covered urban walkway with wet reflective pavement. The camera approaches a large concrete archway exit while futuristic vehicles pass by on the right. A prominent 'WNS' corporate sign glows purple on the left building, and a massive vertical billboard displays a yellow figure on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: sidewalk under elevated highway with neon storefronts

events.description: exits covered walkway and enters open sidewalk beneath overpass structure
turns slightly left to follow the sidewalk curve under the overpass

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk under the overpass, passing neon-lit storefronts and oncoming pedestrians

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in dark clothing walking toward the camera on the narrow sidewalk

entered.detail: elevated highway or monorail structure overhead with exposed metal framework
vibrant purple neon trim lining the edge of a building facade

segments.scene_description: Exiting the covered walkway, the scene transitions to a sidewalk beneath a massive overpass structure. Purple neon lights illuminate the left building facade while pedestrians approach from the distance. The wet pavement continues to reflect the vibrant neon lighting as the camera follows the sidewalk curve.

scene_state.functional_zone: major intersection with digital billboards and overhead walkways

events.description: waits for futuristic traffic to pass before entering the crosswalk
crosses the intersection diagonally toward the far corner with billboard displays

agents.ego_description: navigating across the busy intersection, avoiding vehicles and following pedestrian flow toward the neon-lit buildings

notable_agents.action: orange utility truck driving through the intersection from left to right
pedestrian in reflective safety vest crossing the street ahead

entered.detail: massive curved digital screen displaying advertisements on the building facade
pedestrian or vehicle bridge spanning across the street overhead with metal trusses
large red neon sign with Japanese characters '天下無双' meaning unrivaled under heaven
broad pedestrian crossing with yellow stripes crossing multiple lanes

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a wide urban intersection dominated by massive digital billboards and neon signage. The camera crosses the street while avoiding an orange utility truck and other traffic. A prominent red Japanese sign reading '天下無双' glows in the distance, and an overhead bridge structure spans the intersection.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow sidewalk alongside building with geometric light installation

events.description: passing the geometric wall creates shifting cyan light patterns on the surroundings
slows slightly to navigate around other pedestrians on the narrow walkway

agents.ego_description: walking along the narrow sidewalk beside the illuminated geometric wall, passing other pedestrians heading in the same direction

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians walking ahead on the sidewalk toward the intersection

entered.detail: building facade with angular geometric concrete panels emitting bright cyan light from within the gaps
towering skyscrapers covered in dense neon advertisements and holographic displays

segments.scene_description: Walking along a narrower sidewalk, the left side is dominated by a distinctive building facade with angular geometric panels glowing cyan from within. The right side opens to towering skyscrapers covered in dense neon advertisements. Other pedestrians walk ahead toward a distant intersection where a '24' neon sign becomes visible.

scene_state.functional_zone: street corner with 24-hour neon signage and pedestrian crossing

events.description: approaches crosswalk with illuminated green walk signal
crosses the final intersection toward the corner with the prominent 24-hour sign

agents.ego_description: crossing the final intersection toward the building with the prominent pink 24-hour neon sign

notable_agents.action: pedestrian waiting at the crosswalk signal near the pedestrian button

entered.detail: bright pink neon sign displaying '24' with Japanese characters indicating 24-hour service
illuminated walk signal showing green pedestrian figure indicating safe crossing

segments.scene_description: The final segment approaches a street corner dominated by a bright pink neon '24' sign indicating a 24-hour establishment. The camera crosses the intersection as the pedestrian signal shows green, moving toward the vividly lit corner while the geometric wall falls behind on the left.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sheltered urban corridor into the open expanse of a neon-lit city sidewalk. It begins within a covered walkway where wet, reflective pavement mirrors the purple glow of a WNS corporate sign and a massive yellow billboard. As the camera approaches a large concrete archway, futuristic vehicles stream past on the right, guiding the perspective toward the exit. The scene then opens up beneath a massive overpass structure, where the enclosed walls give way to a curving sidewalk populated by distant pedestrians. Finally, the environment shifts into a wider urban vista, with purple neon lights continuing to illuminate the building facades and the shimmering ground.

The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a neon-drenched urban center, moving from a wide, chaotic intersection into a dense corridor of futuristic architecture. It begins by crossing a broad street filled with traffic and an orange utility truck, guided by the glow of massive digital billboards and a prominent red Japanese sign beneath an overhead bridge. As the camera moves forward, the open intersection narrows into a sidewalk flanked by a cyan-glowing geometric facade on the left and towering skyscrapers draped in neon advertisements on the right. The scene then shifts toward a distant street corner, following other pedestrians as the geometric wall recedes. Finally, the camera crosses a second intersection under a green pedestrian signal, arriving at a vividly lit corner dominated by a bright pink 24-hour neon sign.
